hero.badge: Ukuhlaziywa Kwezintatimende Zasebhange Okubeka Ubumfihlo Phambili
hero.subheadline: 120+ amabhange. Amafomathi angu-11. Izilimi ezingu-68. 70+ izimali. I-SDK eyodwa. Izinsizakalo zangaphandle ezingu-zero. 100% ngaphandle kwe-inthanethi.
hero.callout: Inkokhelo eyodwa — akukho okubhalisela, akukho izindleko nge-API ngayinye

comparison.heading: Kungani Ungasebenzisi i-Plaid?
comparison.subtitle: Ama-API ahlanganisayo abiza $30-200K/unyaka, adinga ukuxhumana kwefu futhi athumela idatha yabasebenzisi bakho kumaseva abantu besithathu. I-StatementKit isebenza ngokuphelele engqalasizindeni yakho.

items.title: 120+ amabhange
items.desc: Kuhlelwe ngaphambili kwamabhange e-NA, EU, UK, AU, Asia. Engeza awakho ngesikhathi sokusebenza.

items.title: 100% ngaphandle kwe-inthanethi
items.desc: Ukushaya kwenethiwekhi okungu-zero. Akukho okhiye be-API. Akukho ifu. Idatha ayilokothi ishiye idivayisi.

items.title: Izilimi ezingu-68
items.desc: OCR + ukuhlaziywa kwezinsuku ngesiJalimane, isiFulentshi, isiJapani, isi-Arabhu, isiHindi, isiThayi nokunye. 70+ izimali.

items.title: OCR yamarisidi
items.desc: Khipha umthengisi, inani eliphelele, intela, ithiphu nezinto zomugqa ezithombeni zamarisidi.

items.title: Ukuthunyelwa kwamafomathi
items.desc: Guqula phakathi kwe-CSV, OFX, QIF, JSON. Hlaziya noma yiliphi ifomethi, uthumele kunoma yiliphi elinye.

items.title: Ithuluzi le-CLI
items.desc: npx statementkit parse statement.csv — ukuhlaziywa okungenanhloko kwe-CI/izikripthi.

pricing.heading: Intengo eyodwa. Ukufinyelela kwempilo yonke.
pricing.subtitle: Akukho okubhalisela. Akukho izindleko nge-API ngayinye. Akukho ukuvalelwa kumhlinzeki.
items: Amafomathi okokufaka angu-11 + amafomathi okuthumela angu-4
Ilayisensi ye-MIT — sebenzisa kunoma yimuphi umklamo

items.a: Ikhodi yomthombo ye-TypeScript ephelele enikezwa ngokufinyelela kwe-GitHub repo. 120+ abahlaziyayo bamabhange, abalawuli bamafomathi angu-11, PDF OCR, ithuluzi le-CLI nesixhumanisi somhlinzeki we-AI. Ilayisensi ye-MIT — sebenzisa kunoma yimuphi umklamo, wezohwebo noma womuntu siqu.

Konke ukuhlaziywa kusebenza endaweni — CSV, OFX, QIF, MT940, ne-CAMT akudingi ukushaya kwenethiwekhi. I-PDF OCR isebenzisa i-Tesseract.js esebenza kusiphequluli noma ku-Node.js. Ayikho idatha elokothi ishiye ingqalasizinda yakho.
Yebo. Sebenzisa i-registerBank() ngesikhathi sokusebenza, layisha emafayeleni okuhlela e-JSON noma sebenzisa umyalo we-CLI config suggest ukuthola ngokuzenzakalelayo izinhlu kusampula ye-CSV.

I-AI iyinto ekhethwayo ngo-100%. Konke ukuhlaziywa kusebenza ngaphandle kwayo. Uma ufuna ukutholwa okuhlakaniphile kwezimpinda noma ukucebisa kwedatha yomthengisi, letha ukhiye wakho we-API (OpenAI, Anthropic noma noma yiliphi i-LLM) ngesixhumanisi se-AIProvider.

Abahlaziyayo abayinhloko batholakala njengephakheji ye-npm ye-open-source. Inguqulo ye-Pro ($79) yengeza i-PDF OCR, ukusekelwa kwe-CAMT/MT940, ithuluzi le-CLI, isixhumanisi se-AI nokuhlela kwamabhange okubalulekile.
